name: mcp-server-git
description: Tools to read, search, and manipulate Git repositories.

rating.reason: The toolset provides adequate but inconsistent documentation. While tool names are clear and purposeful, descriptions are mostly basic single sentences that lack usage context and important limitations. Parameter documentation varies significantly - some tools like git_log and git_branch have well-documented parameters with examples and constraints, while others like git_status and git_commit have minimal parameter descriptions. The repo_path parameter is consistently underdescribed across all tools, lacking explanation of expected path format or behavior.
